title: Production Hardening — Qdrant Vector Database Scaling & Backup Configuration
subtasks: Scale Qdrant deployment from single replica to 3-replica cluster for high availability
Configure Qdrant snapshot-based automated backups (daily snapshots with 7-day retention)
Configure resource requests and limits appropriate for production workloads (memory, CPU)
Add anti-affinity rules to distribute Qdrant replicas across nodes
Verify collection replication factor is set to match replica count

title: Production Hardening — TLS Certificates via cert-manager & Ingress Configuration
subtasks: Verify cert-manager is deployed (present via gitlab/gitlab-certmanager) and configure ClusterIssuer for Let's Encrypt production and staging
Create Certificate resources for all public-facing services: cto-web, cto-pm, cto-tools, cto-openmemory, dashboard (app/dashboard)
Configure Ingress resources with TLS termination for all public services using cert-manager annotations
Set up automatic certificate renewal monitoring and alerting
Configure HTTPS redirect (HTTP → HTTPS) on all Ingress resources
Add TLS for internal service-to-service communication where required (Solana RPC, Qdrant, GitLab internal)

title: Production Hardening — Cloudflare CDN & Tunnel Configuration for Static Assets and Public Endpoints
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare Tunnel resources using the existing cloudflare-operator (CRDs: clustertunnels, accesstunnels) for public service exposure
Create ClusterTunnel or AccessTunnel CRs for cto-web, cto-pm, dashboard, and any demo endpoints
Configure Cloudflare CDN caching rules for static assets served by the Next.js dashboard (cache HTML, JS, CSS, images with appropriate TTLs)
Set up Cloudflare WAF rules for DDoS protection on public endpoints
Configure DNS records pointing to Cloudflare Tunnel endpoints
Enable Cloudflare analytics and real-user monitoring for the dashboard

title: Production Hardening — Cilium Network Policies for Pod-to-Pod Traffic Restriction
subtasks: Create CiliumNetworkPolicy for the cto namespace: allow cto-controller to reach Solana validator, Qdrant, and external Solana devnet RPC; deny all other egress by default
Create CiliumNetworkPolicy for Qdrant: allow ingress only from cto-controller and cto-openmemory pods; deny external access
Create CiliumNetworkPolicy for the Solana validator pod (infra/solana-dev): allow ingress on ports 8899/8900 only from cto namespace pods
Create CiliumNetworkPolicy for GitLab namespace: restrict access to GitLab services from only cto-controller and CI runner pods
Create default-deny CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy as a baseline, with explicit allow policies layered on top
Test network policies by verifying blocked connections timeout and allowed connections succeed using ephemeral debug pods
Document all network policy rules in docs/network-policies.md

title: Production Hardening — External Secrets Operator & OpenBao Secret Rotation for Production Credentials
subtasks: Configure ExternalSecret resources (using existing external-secrets operator and ClusterSecretStore) for all Solana keypairs (operator, treasury) to sync from OpenBao
Create ExternalSecret for Irys/Bundlr API credentials with automatic refresh interval (1h)
Create ExternalSecret for Cloudflare API tokens used by cloudflare-operator
Configure secret rotation policy: rotate Solana operator keypair quarterly, document rotation procedure
Set up ClusterExternalSecret for shared credentials needed across namespaces (e.g., Solana RPC URL, program ID)
Verify all secrets are mounted as volumes (not environment variables) for improved security posture
Audit and remove any hardcoded credentials or .env files from repository and deployments

title: Production Hardening — Datadog Observability Configuration for Solana Billing Pipeline
subtasks: Configure Datadog Agent (existing datadog-agent deployment) to collect custom metrics from cto-controller billing module: settlement_count, settlement_latency_ms, refund_count, receipt_upload_latency_ms, solana_rpc_latency_ms
Create DatadogMonitor CRs for SLO violation alerts: settlement failure rate > 5% over 5min, receipt upload latency P99 > 30s, Solana RPC timeout rate > 10%
Configure Datadog APM tracing for the Rust controller billing module using dd-trace integration
Set up Datadog dashboard for billing pipeline: settlement throughput, USDC volume settled, customer balance distribution, agent package earnings leaderboard
Configure DatadogMetric CRs for custom business metrics: total_usdc_deposited, total_usdc_settled, active_customer_count
Set up log aggregation for billing-related logs with proper log levels and structured JSON formatting
Configure Datadog PodAutoscaler CRs for cto-controller based on settlement queue depth if applicable
Create runbook documentation for each alert in docs/runbooks/

title: Production Hardening — GitLab PostgreSQL & Redis Scaling for CI/CD Reliability
subtasks: Review GitLab PostgreSQL (gitlab/gitlab-postgresql) configuration and scale to appropriate resource limits for production CI workloads
Configure GitLab PostgreSQL automated backups (daily pg_dump with 14-day retention to persistent volume or S3-compatible storage)
Scale GitLab Redis from single master to Redis with readiness replicas if not already configured (gitlab/gitlab-redis-master, gitlab/gitlab-redis-headless)
Configure Redis maxmemory policy (allkeys-lru) and memory limits appropriate for GitLab workload
Set up PostgreSQL connection pooling via PgBouncer sidecar if connection count exceeds 100
Add health check monitoring for GitLab database services via Datadog integration

title: Production Hardening — GitHub Actions Runner Autoscaling & CI Resource Optimization
subtasks: Configure AutoscalingRunnerSet CRs (existing CRD: autoscalingrunnersets.actions.github.com) with appropriate min/max replica counts for CI workload
Set resource requests and limits on EphemeralRunner pods: 2 CPU / 4Gi memory for Anchor build jobs, 1 CPU / 2Gi for lint/test jobs
Configure runner labels to match CI workflow job requirements (e.g., solana-builder, bun-runner)
Set up AutoscalingListener CR with scale-down delay to avoid runner churn during sequential pipeline stages
Configure persistent volume claims for runner workspace caching (Rust target directory, Bun modules) to speed up CI builds
Monitor runner utilization via Datadog and set alerts for runner queue depth > 5 for > 5 minutes

title: Production Hardening — ArgoCD GitOps Configuration for All Billing Infrastructure
subtasks: Create ArgoCD Application CRs for all billing infrastructure components: solana-dev Helm chart, cto-billing ConfigMaps/Secrets, dashboard deployment, Cilium network policies
Configure ArgoCD sync policies: auto-sync with self-heal for non-secret resources, manual sync for secret rotations
Set up ArgoCD ApplicationSet for environment promotion (dev → staging → production) when multi-environment is needed
Configure ArgoCD health checks for custom CRDs (BoltRuns, CodeRuns) so ArgoCD accurately reports application health
Set up ArgoCD notifications (via argocd-notifications-controller) to post deployment status to Discord (via discord-bridge-http in bots namespace)
Configure ArgoCD RBAC policies restricting who can sync/delete production applications
Document the GitOps workflow in docs/gitops.md including directory structure, promotion process, and rollback procedures
